evidence: Reviewed Story 1 scope and locked constraints from artifacts/user-prompts/get-single-issue-api.md and /memories/session/get-single-issue-api-phase2-brief.md requirement lock.
Phase 2 brief constraints are specific, testable, and non-contradictory for Story 1 implementation.
artifacts/user-stories/get-single-issue-api.story.md preserves Story 1-only scope, issue_iid mapping, two-layer boundary, and changeSets placeholder requirement.
Story defines acceptance criteria, in/out of scope, defaults/null rules, and error handling requirements needed for implementation.
artifacts/implementation-plans/get-single-issue-api.plan.md keeps Story 1 scope, excludes label-events calls, and retains changeSets as empty array.
Plan preserves orchestration/integration boundaries, explicit mapping ownership, and centralized sanitized error handling per documentation/constitution.md.
Plan includes payload examples, validation boundary, slice logging expectations, documentation updates, and verification scope.
Plan defines one implementation slice with unit, integration, component, and Karate coverage plus acceptance criteria traceability.
No silent reinterpretation detected between request, story, and plan; Story 2 work remains explicitly out of scope.

phase1Decision.reason: Story and implementation plan are implementation-ready for Story 1 without constitutional conflicts or scope drift.
